title: hypericum rigidum
intro: Hypericum rigidum, also known as the stiff St. John's Wort or stiff hypericum, is a plant species belonging to the St. John's Wort family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects, as well as its ability to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hypericum rigidum include reducing anxiety and depression, improving sleep quality, and providing antioxidant protection against free radicals. Hypericum rigidum can be prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or tincture, and is often used topically to treat skin issues, or taken internally to support mental health.
